Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew McClelland, esq. (415-426-3521) of Lunski & Stimpert LLP for Plaintiff.
Ron Lunski, esq. (415-426-3525) of Lunski & Stimpert LLP for Plaintiff via Court Call
Ryan D. Golds, esq. (818-889-6886) for Defendant.

Hearing is held re: confidential emails. Plaintiff agrees to withdraw their motion/filings. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs MELANIE LARKIN and RICHARD SMITH's Motion For A Preliminary Injunction is moot. Counsel for Plaintiff is required to submit a proposed order directing the court to delete the documents from the Regist of Actions and to contact File and Serve Express to also remove from their system.

Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew McClelland, esq. (415-426-3521) of Lunski & Stimpert LLP for Plaintiff.
Ron Lunski, esq. (415-426-3525) of Lunski & Stimpert LLP for Plaintiff via Court Call
Ryan D. Golds, esq. (818-889-6886) for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs MELANIE LARKIN and RICHARD SMITH's Motion To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. Mr. Marleen, as the sole owner of the signatory corporation, is bound by the arbitration agreement and this action shall proceed to arbitration forthwith.

Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ron Lunski, Esq. of Lunski & Stimpert LLP, 415-426-3525, appearing for Melanie Larkin, Plaintiff and moving party.

Ryan Golds, Esq., 805-241-6886, appearing for Roland Mungues, for Defendant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Mr. Lunski stated that this motion was unopposed and that he did not get any notification that Mr. Gold had a medical condition that would prevent him from preparing a response. Mr. Gold argued that his client inadvertently sent an email to all parties that contained confidential information. Mr. Lunski responded that he believed that email was credible.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MELANIE LARKIN, RICHARD SMITH Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction is taken under submission. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ron Lunski, Esq. of Lunski & Stimpert LLP, 415-426-3525, appearing for Melanie Larkin, Plaintiff and moving party.

Ryan Golds, Esq., 805-241-6886, appearing for Roland Mungues, for Defendant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Mr. Lunski stated that he contests the tentative, provided case background and requested that the court allow him to file a supplemental briefing schedule. Mr. Gold argued that there was no proof of service.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
PLAINTIFF MELANIE LARKIN, RICHARD SMITH Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration is taken under submission. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
